name: higher-order
description: Reusable skills for higher-order agent work, integrated taste, and better judgment.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable skills for higher-order agent work and integrated taste.
interface.longDescription: Higher Order packages reusable Codex skills for better agent work: scoping the real problem, defining success, narrowing decisions, writing implementation-ready guidance, structuring projects, reviewing UI, and applying integrated taste so outputs fit the user's intent instead of merely satisfying a checklist.
defaultPrompt: Use Higher Order to turn this idea into the smallest useful implementation plan.
Review this proposal for taste: what feels overbuilt, under-specified, or wrong for the user?
Define success before implementing this change, then keep the plan small.
